landing.heroDescription: Track calories with your camera, scan your body fat with AI, and visualize your transformation — all in one app.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Powered by cutting-edge AI to make tracking effortless and results visible.
landing.feature1Desc: Snap a photo of your meal and our AI instantly estimates calories, macros, and portion sizes.
landing.feature2Desc: Upload a photo and get an AI-estimated body fat percentage with confidence scoring.
landing.feature3Desc: See what you could look like at your target body fat percentage with AI-generated previews.
landing.feature4Desc: Log workouts with an extensive exercise library. Track sets, reps, and progressive overload.
landing.feature5Desc: Visualize your weight, calorie, and body composition trends with beautiful interactive charts.
landing.feature6Desc: Get personalized meal suggestions and workout plans tailored to your goals and preferences.
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Three simple steps to a better you.
landing.step1Desc: Create your free account in seconds. Set your body goals and preferences.
landing.step2Desc: Log meals with your camera, record workouts, and monitor your weight trends.
landing.step3Desc: Watch your progress unfold with AI insights, body scans, and transformation previews.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Pay only for what you use. Every AI feature has a clear credit cost.
landing.planPackFeature2: Stack on top of any plan
landing.planPackFeature4: Buy as many as you need
landing.testimonial1Quote: The food camera is a game-changer. I just snap a photo and it tracks everything. No more guessing calories.
landing.testimonial2Quote: Seeing my transformation preview gave me the motivation I needed. It made my goal feel real and achievable.
landing.testimonial3Quote: The body fat scanning is incredibly accurate. I was able to track my cut progress week by week without expensive DEXA scans.

consent.title: Required Agreements
consent.terms: I agree to the {terms} and {disclaimer}. I understand this app does not provide medical advice.
consent.privacy: I agree to the {privacy}. I understand my photos and data may be transmitted to third-party AI services (OpenAI, Google, Anthropic, Replicate) for analysis.
consent.sensitiveData: I consent to the collection and processing of sensitive personal data (ethnicity, body measurements, health-related data, body images) as described in the Privacy Policy.
consent.ageVerification: I confirm that I am at least 18 years of age.

footer.description: AI-powered fitness tracking to help you achieve your body transformation goals.

bodyfatAccuracy.q: How accurate is the body fat scan?
bodyfatAccuracy.a: Our AI provides a rough estimate of body fat percentage based on visual analysis. Results are approximations and may vary depending on photo quality, lighting, and posture. For clinical precision, we recommend DEXA scans or consultation with a healthcare professional. This is not a medical measurement.

credits.q: How does the credit system work?
credits.a: Every AI-powered feature costs a set number of credits. Free users get 10 credits per month. Pro subscribers get 100 credits per month. You can also purchase credit packs that never expire.

foodCamera.a: The food camera uses vision AI to identify foods and estimate portions. Results are approximations — actual calories and macros may vary based on portion size, ingredients, and preparation. You can always adjust the estimates manually. Do not rely on these estimates for managing medical dietary requirements.

transformation.a: It uses AI image editing to generate a creative visualization of what your body might look like at a different body fat percentage. These are artistic renderings, not predictions or guarantees of actual results. Individual outcomes depend on genetics, diet, exercise, and many other factors.

cancel.q: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
cancel.a: Yes, you can cancel your Pro subscription at any time. You will keep your credits until the end of the billing period. Purchased credit packs never expire regardless of subscription status.

dataSecurity.a: Your data is encrypted and stored following industry best practices. Photos you upload are transmitted securely to third-party AI services (such as OpenAI, Google, and Anthropic) for analysis — see our Privacy Policy for full details. We do not sell your data. You can request deletion of your data at any time.
